name:
I'm on a narrow ledge by a Throne-room
Across the chasm is another ledge
description:
I'm on a narrow ledge by a Throne-room
Across the chasm is another ledge
hints: There is a bear blocking the throne room and a treasure here. Deal with the bear first.
The bear is thin and hungry. Maybe feeding it something sweet would help.
Give the bear the royal honey to fatten it up or make it move. Then you can enter the throne room.
Give the bear honey (DROP HONEY or GIVE HONEY). Once the bear is dealt with, GO THRONE to enter the throne room. GET MIRROR for a treasure. JUMP to go back across the chasm.

needs: Very thin black bear (must be in room)

effects:
Message: Try --> `LOOK, JUMP, SWIM, CLIMB, FIND, TAKE, SCORE, DROP`
and any other verbs you can think of...

notes: Ledge with the magic mirror treasure and a hungry bear blocking the throne room. Feed the bear royal honey to remove it. JUMP crosses back to the other ledge (room 19). GO THRONE enters the throne room (room 22) once the bear is gone.
